stemHtml: As an arriving VFR pilot approaching your destination (ATIS available), how do you request instructions from approach control before entering their jurisdiction?

options.a: EC-IOS, PA28, VFR FROM MADRID TO BARCELONA, 3000 FEET, CONTROL ZONE BOUNDARY 08, BARCELONA 12, INFORMATION WHISKEY.
options.b: EC-IOS, INFORMATION WHISKEY, PA28, 3000 FEET, ESTIMATES BARCELONA AT 1312, DEPARTED MADRID.
options.c: BARCELONA APPROACH, THIS IS EC-IOS APPROACHING FROM SOUTH AT 3000 FEET, REQUEST LATEST WEATHER.
options.d: EC-IOS, INBOUND FROM MADRID, 3000 FEET, INFORMATION WHISKEY.
